title: efossus crispatus
intro: Efossus crispatus, also known as the cranesbill or geranium, is a type of flowering plant in the geraniaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which make it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Efossus crispatus include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Efossus crispatus can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
